articles.description: India's dominant T20 World Cup title win - their third white-ball trophy in a row - shows the other nations need to catch up, writes Matthew Henry.

articles.description: As if the ugliness of the 120 minutes wasn't enough there was disgrace as Rangers and Celtic fans invaded the pitch at Ibrox, writes Tom English.
articles.title: Rangers v Celtic: 'Disgraceful scenes as toxicity spills over in Old Firm cup tie'

articles.description: The opening race of F1's new era in Australia left the drivers with mixed feelings about what the sport had become, writes Andrew Benson.
articles.title: Australian Grand Prix: Was new-era F1 really racing or more like a computer game?
